title: Kurtzy 20 Pack Brown Kraft Gift Boxes - Box Measures 19 x 11 x 4.5cm (7.48 x 4.33 x 1.77 inches) - Easy Assemble Rectangle Presentation Favour Present Box - Parties, Birthdays, Weddings, Holidays
features: BULK PACK OF 20 BOXES: These high quality brown kraft paper card gift boxes with lids have a charming rustic look. When assembled each rectangle box measures L19 x W11 x H4.5cm (7.48 x 4.33 x 1.77 inches). When they arrive they will be flatpacked and will each measure L38 x W36 (14.96 x 14.17 inches).

EASY TO ASSEMBLE: They arrive flat packed for convenient storage until you need them. To make up a box, simply fold along all the pre scored lines and create the base first. Once you have done this, you can tuck the sides down to hold them in place. It is advised to not use these boxes for posting.

PERSONALISE PRESENTS: You can decorate these boxes to be as beautiful as the present inside. Add ribbons, bows, twine, wrapping paper, stickers, stamps and even your own artwork to fit the party or gifting theme. These boxes are great for home baked treats like cookies and sweets to give to friends and family. Also, you can create some thank you gift boxes to give to your work colleagues.

GIVE THE PERFECT GIFT: Since these boxes are blank they and can be decorated how you like, this makes them perfect for any celebration, event or occasion. Use them for gifting at bridesmaid parties, groomsman celebrations, mother's day & father's day, baby showers, weddings, birthday parties, Valentine's day, work parties, Halloween and of course Christmas.

DESIGNED FOR LIFE: Every product in our collection is built with purpose, blending function and style. Our thoughtfully crafted designs ensure lasting reliability and convenience when needed, ideal for any occasion. Please ensure all edible items are properly wrapped.
description: Product Description For Every Project Reliable DIY, crafting and home improvement tools, offering great value. High-Quality Tools Dependable tools and protective great, designed to keep you safe during every project. Versatile Solutions From beginners to experts, Kurtzy provides versatile tools that make every project easier and more efficient.
